title: Delivery Delays and Resend Steps
snippet: If a digital card has not arrived, confirm the recipient email, check spam folders, and verify order status before requesting a resend.
resolution_steps: Confirm order email and recipient email are correct.
Check spam or promotions folders for fulfillment messages.
Use the order status page to confirm processing state.
If still missing after processing, contact support to request resend.

title: Activation Failure: Troubleshooting Invalid or Declined Card
snippet: Activation failures are often caused by entry errors, pending activation windows, or merchant-side validation mismatch.
resolution_steps: Re-enter code values and verify ZIP/PIN details.
Wait for posted activation window if purchase was recent.
Retry redemption at supported merchants only.
Escalate with transaction timestamp if failure persists.

title: Balance Mismatch and Prior Authorization Holds
snippet: Balance discrepancies can occur due to prior authorization holds or partial settlements not yet released.
resolution_steps: Check current balance and recent transactions.
Look for pending authorization holds from merchant checks.
Wait for hold release period where applicable.
Submit dispute request if balance does not normalize.

title: Refund and Chargeback Timeline Expectations
snippet: Refund and chargeback handling depends on payment method and issuing timelines, with updates provided during review.
resolution_steps: Collect order number and payment confirmation.
Submit refund or billing issue ticket with evidence.
Track case updates from support communications.
Escalate only if SLA window has passed.

title: Support Escalation Path for Unresolved Cases
snippet: When first-line support stalls, escalation requires case ID, prior contact history, and concise issue summary.
resolution_steps: Provide existing case number and latest response time.
Summarize unresolved issue in one clear paragraph.
Request escalation review by specialist queue.
Set callback or follow-up expectation.

title: Fraud and Unauthorized Use Reporting Checklist
snippet: Fraud incidents should be reported immediately with card details, transaction timestamps, and supporting evidence.
resolution_steps: Stop sharing card details publicly.
Capture suspicious transaction times and amounts.
Submit fraud report through support intake.
Monitor account and payment statements for new activity.

title: Checkout Errors and Payment Retry Guidance
snippet: Checkout failures may come from browser state, payment verification, or temporary gateway interruption.
resolution_steps: Retry in private browsing mode or clear session cache.
Validate billing details and payment limits.
Attempt purchase after brief wait if gateway unavailable.
Contact support with error timestamp and screenshot.

title: PIN Reset and Redemption Configuration
snippet: PIN-related redemption issues are often resolved by resetting PIN and verifying merchant acceptance requirements.
resolution_steps: Reset PIN using self-service tools where available.
Verify merchant accepts that card type.
Reattempt with corrected payment sequence.
Escalate if merchant decline reason is unclear.
